name: Clatronic International
message: [AI generated] "Clatronic International GmbH" is a German company specializing in small and large household electronic appliances. It was founded in 1985 and has built a strong reputation for producing high-quality products across Europe. The appliances they manufacture include kitchen gadgets, cleaning appliances, health & wellness devices, and multimedia electronics. They prioritize functionality, ease of use, and contemporary design in their products.
